leadText: The Aqua Suit (Japanese: アクアスーツ Aqua Suit) is a Key Item introduced in Generation VI.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Alpha Sapphire , the Aqua Suit allows the player to reach Kyogre 's chamber in the Cave of Origin . It is later used in the climax of the Delta Episode to ride Mega Rayquaza into space and confront Deoxys .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A suit made with the collective technological know-how of Team Aqua. It can withstand any impact.

It is later used in the climax of the Delta Episode to ride Mega Rayquaza into space and confront Deoxys . sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] A replica of the Aqua Suit helmet can be bought from Atticus at the Porto Marinada Market in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet .
